name: username
label: Username
help: TikTok username, @handle, or profile URL, e.g. hydrojug or https://www.tiktok.com/@hydrojug.

name: limit
label: Limit
help: Max items to return. Default 20, max 200. Billed per result.

name: cache
label: Cache
help: Set true to serve from the 24h response cache. Default false — always fetch fresh data.
